title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Colliers India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Colliers India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Colliers India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Colliers India:
Colliers India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colliers India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
